content: An active search agent can augment the Chain of Hindsight framework by dynamically retrieving relevant prior self-correction trajectories instead of relying on a fixed, precomputed chain of past reflections, enabling the agent to adapt its hindsight to novel, out-of-distribution tasks. This creates a recursive self-improvement loop where the agent actively searches for the most useful past lessons rather than being constrained by the order or selection of hindsight steps baked into its training data.
source_topics: Active Agentic Retrieval with Search Agents
